message:
style: apply rustfmt formatting to main.rs and fcwrap.rs

Minor formatting adjustments applied by rustfmt:
- main.rs: collapse assert_eq! macro arguments onto fewer lines where
  the value+expected fit on one line, and reformat multi-line path
  predicate chain for readability
- fcwrap.rs: collapse FcPatternAddCharSet FFI call arguments onto a
  single line (short enough to fit within line width)

No behavioral changes — purely cosmetic alignment with project rustfmt
configuration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
